name: LEPC Exact Poundage Reporting and Range Code Correction
description:
The LEPC requires precise poundage reporting for EHS chemicals. Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Import the baseline facility data from C:\workspace\data\precision_chemicals_baseline.t2s. (If import fails or the file is unavailable, manually create a new facility named 'Precision Specialty Chemicals' with two chemicals: Sulfuric Acid [CAS 7664-93-9, Max/Avg Range Codes: 05/05] and Hydrofluoric Acid [CAS 7664-39-3, Max/Avg Range Codes: 03/03]).

Your task is to update this facility's chemical inventory with exact quantities:
1. Sulfuric Acid: Enter Exact Max Daily Amount = 8450 lbs, Exact Avg Daily Amount = 6200 lbs.
2. Hydrofluoric Acid: Enter Exact Max Daily Amount = 1250 lbs, Exact Avg Daily Amount = 800 lbs.
3. CRITICAL: Review and correct the EPA Range Codes for both chemicals. If a new exact amount shifts a chemical into a different bracket, you MUST update the Range Code to match the new exact amount. (Hint: Range 03 is 500-999 lbs, Range 04 is 1,000-4,999 lbs, Range 05 is 5,000-9,999 lbs).

After making all required updates, save and export the submission file exactly to C:\workspace\data\precision_chemicals_updated.t2s.
